title: Rust from Zero (Starter)
description: A free starter introduction to Rust: environment setup, ownership and borrowing, and modeling data with structs and enums.

modules.title: Setup and Hello World
modules.description: Install Rust via rustup, configure your editor, and write your first program. Understand cargo, crates, and the Rust compilation model.
objectives: Install Rust and cargo via rustup
Create and run a new cargo project
Explain the role of Cargo.toml and the crate registry

modules.title: Ownership and Borrowing
modules.description: Master Rust's core memory-safety model: ownership rules, move semantics, borrowing, and references.
objectives: Use immutable and mutable references correctly

modules.title: Structs, Enums, and Pattern Matching
modules.description: Model data with structs and enums, and use match expressions for exhaustive, safe control flow.
objectives: Define and instantiate structs and enums
